extDescription.message: Replace fonts on any website. Upload your own, pull from Google Fonts, and save settings per site.

uploadSubtitle.message: Add one or more font files to your local library.

uploadChooseFiles.message: Choose one or more font files

urlImportHint.message: Google Fonts, CDN links, or direct .woff2 / .ttf URLs

statusInvalidUrl.message: That doesn't look like a valid URL.

uploadLocalOnly.message: Files stay local in Chrome and are never uploaded anywhere.

applyTypographySubtitle.message: Choose where the font applies and refine the reading rhythm for this site.

globalDefaultFont.message: Use default font on all sites

globalDefaultHint.message: When a site has no override, this font and default typography apply.

saveAsDefaultHint.message: Use these values for new sites.

deleteFontHint.message: Removes the file from your local library.

sitesSubtitle.message: Sites where you have saved font overrides. Toggle on/off or remove.

copiedPasteBelow.message: Copied. Paste to a site below.

noSitesYet.message: No sites saved yet. Apply a font on a page to add it.

targetNotFoundMsg.message: Saved target not found on this page.

selectorWarning.message: On dynamic pages a fallback selector is used when the layout changes; if the target no longer matches, use Pick on page again.

mainFrameHint.message: Override applies to the main frame of the tab.

storageHighConfirm.message: Storage usage is high. Add fonts anyway?

removeUnusedConfirm.message: Remove $1 unused font(s)? This cannot be undone.

siteLabelCantStyle.message: This tab cannot be styled. Open a regular http or https page.

siteLabelNoOverride.message: Domain: $1. No override is active yet.

statusGlobalOn.message: Default font will apply on sites without an override.

statusUseWholePage.message: Using whole page for this site.

statusPickerActive.message: Element picker is active in the main frame of this tab. Click on the page; the popup can close while you pick.

statusPickElementFirst.message: Use Pick on page to choose an element target.

statusNothingToApply.message: There is nothing to apply on this tab.

statusPickElementBeforeApply.message: Pick an element on the page first.

statusCouldNotApply.message: Could not apply typography on this tab.

statusNoSavedSetting.message: There is no saved setting for this domain.

statusCouldNotReset.message: Could not reset the setting for this tab.

statusNoFontToDelete.message: There is no selected font to delete.

statusCouldNotDelete.message: Could not delete the selected font.

statusOpenWebsiteFirst.message: Open a regular website before using the picker.

statusCouldNotStartPicker.message: Could not start the element picker on this tab.

statusSelectFilesFirst.message: Select at least one font file first.

statusCouldNotReadFont.message: Could not read the selected font file.

statusCouldNotSaveFonts.message: Could not save fonts (storage full or error).

statusCouldNotRefresh.message: Could not refresh the saved state.

statusCouldNotStartFocusCapture.message: Could not start focus capture on this tab.

statusNoSiteSettings.message: No settings found for the current site.

statusMustKeepOneRule.message: Must keep at least one rule.

statusPairApplied.message: Pair applied — both fonts active on this site.

inspectHeroText.message: Scan the page to see what fonts it uses — loaded font faces, @font-face declarations, and computed styles on key elements.

inspectNoData.message: No font data found on this page.
